headline: Shares of sports betting-related companies are trading higher after reports suggesting that some U.S. Senators plan to submit a bill today that would ban CFTC-regulated enterprises, including prediction markets, from offering wagers on sporting events.
summary: Shares of sports betting-related companies are trading higher after reports suggesting that some U.S. Senators plan to submit a bill today that would ban CFTC-regulated enterprises, including prediction markets, from offering wagers on sporting events.
